feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Taleb just posted a new video explaining that not all people who speak Arabic ar…

entry.title: /int/ International: How do I move to Kent?
entry.content: I live in Teesside but I was born in Kent and I am culturally and genetically a Southern Englishman, I want to go back down south but I cannot as I'm too poor and I was only forced to move up north when I was 11 by my parents. I miss the south and I hate the north, I don't like there accents and I hate all the chavs, smackheads, football hooligans, lads and Pakis. I feel alienated like I don't belong. Please help me get to my native homeland.

entry.title: /int/ International: >86-year-old woman lost 180.000 euros in a phone scam, she was told the country …
entry.content: >86-year-old woman lost 180.000 euros in a phone scam, she was told the country was about to change currency >As the elderly woman reported, she received a phone call from an unknown man who introduced himself to her as an accountant, who convinced her that an immediate change of currency was imminent, corresponding to the transition from the drachma to the euro, and that she should replace the banknotes in her possession > They then asked her to collect all the money she had in her house, put i

entry.title: /b/ Random: AMA - Genius Edition
entry.content: So I got professionally tested a few years back. Scored in the 99.9th percentile. Mensa keeps sending me letters. I can do complex calculus in my head, I taught myself three programming languages by age 14, and I can see the logical flaws in every movie plot within the first 5 minutes. And you know what it's gotten me? Absolutely fucking nothing except crippling loneliness, crippling anxiety, and a front-row seat to how staggeringly stupid the average person is. I'm 26, I work a dead-end remote

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I grew up under extremely precarious circumstances with a father who was very di…
entry.content: I grew up under extremely precarious circumstances with a father who was very distant and disinterested in me, and a schizophrenic mother who constantly treated me like a toddler. Now I’m already 21, I was a NEET for three years, I’m currently studying computer science (a hopeless major, I know). I have zero friends, I’m extremely antisocial, and I’m not willing to take responsibility for myself. I’m studying with dudes who are 18/19 years old and already much more mature than I am. They look mu

It has been speculated by independent reaserchers that resource rich mines, child slave farms and UAP airports are all currently in operation behind the wall. It's up to us to uncover these operatio

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I don't know what to do with technology anymore. I watched all the youtube video…
entry.content: I don't know what to do with technology anymore. I watched all the youtube videos, I played every game, I hosted every service, I corebooted my thinkpad, I played with rpis, I hacked my consoles, I watched porn, I watched brainrot, I read books, I played with LLM, I generated images, I created servers, I... I've done everything. There is nothing else to do with technology. Nowadays I just read my rss feed and maybe listen to some music and that's it. I come here every day to see the same posts.

entry.title: /int/ International: Understanding the europoor mindset
entry.content: A top European AI tech executive that was poached by American firms published a book explaining how it's impossible to do business in Europe and things are basically fucked and they will be completely out of the AI race in the next 6 years which will be disastrous for European economies that will see loss of productivity and become even more dependent on the US and all the comments were like: >Europe LOSING the AI race??? entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Poke ALL Toads soundtrack
entry.content: Looks like the Friday Fairy Thread didn't fly so good this week. We had another fae thread earlier, so it's all good though. I promised an anon last week that I would post the Poke ALL Toads soundtrack next Friday, but when I looked the thread up it was alrady gone. Anyway, here's the soundtrack I extracted from the game using Godot RE Tools application. Again, apologies for the PATdev (and Composer); I'll buy the soundtrack if it ever becomes available. It's got some lovely tunes. The titles/fi

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: TV Mandela Effect/Retcon: Castle now started in 2009!?!
entry.content: Ok, so I never actually watched this series, but I still remember seeing ads for it as a child. The thing is, I remember seeing them back in like 2005/2006. And from what I gathered/remember, it seemed like the show had already been out for like a year or 2 at that point. But a few years ago, I found out this show supposedly started airing in 2009. This is really confusing to me as first off, I remember seeing and hearing the word Castle and the scroll they had in the ads back then, so idk what

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why were they lying about how the usual American (fat asshole) dinner table look…
entry.content: Why were they lying about how the usual American (fat asshole) dinner table looked like? That's like 10 pounds of corn, carrot and beans. And milk? With a steak? No way you fat kid shooting lardasses were eating anywhere this healthy at any point in time. I really enjoy the show for it's political satire and whenever the fat kid makes fun of the nose kid, I laugh, yes. BUT, this is just unnacceppatbble. Sort this out.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Did you watch Citizen Vigilante?
entry.content: Well, did you? What did you think? I thought it came off like a half-baked cake. Like it could have been done so much better. One of the scenes was GREAT, and one I found--- unhelpful. But it definitely comes off as incitement. Uwe Boll doesn't pull any punches that he's talking about a specific thing: illegal immigrants or "refugees," and various European governments' indifference to the harm they can do to society. He's telling people to act. Seems like incitement, to me.

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump’s Board of Peace plans to grant itself sweeping immunity, documents show
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/law/202 6/jun/27/board-of-peace-legal-immun ity-un The UN-sanctioned Board of Peace announced by Donald Trump earlier this year to rule Gaza is planning a sweeping grant of legal immunity for itself, according to a draft of the resolution obtained by the Guardian. The draft language would also let the organization obtain public property in Gaza “free of charge”. The four-page resolution, labeled “sensitive but unclassified”, extends broad protections to every member o

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why turbos fail
entry.content: According to Google, turbos mainly fail due to dirty oil or oil starvation, overheating, and carbon build up.. Almost all turbos are now paired with Direct Injected engines.. Wouldn't this be a direct cause for failures then? Seeing as DI raises pressure and builds carbon up

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >desktop version of ChatGPT stops working >log into browser version to ask it wh…
entry.content: >desktop version of ChatGPT stops working >log into browser version to ask it what the problem is >spend an hour following its troubleshooting suggestions >give up and decide to google the problem instead >google AI mode immediately directs me to a post on the OpenAI developer forum where people are discussing this very issue which is 100% on OpenAI's end So this is the power of ChatGPT...
